englishLines: Today's work: Exterior painting using a mobile scaffold
Main hazards for this job: fall hazard, mobile scaffold movement, strong wind, forklift route conflict
Before starting: Wear fall-protection PPE and stay inside the safe work platform.
Lock wheels, keep guardrails in place, and do not move the scaffold with a worker on it.
Stop scaffold or outdoor work if strong wind increases or the scaffold moves.
If you do not understand, stop and ask the supervisor to explain again.
